caption: The video depicts a professional presentation setting where a woman, dressed in a black blazer, is giving a talk to an audience. She stands confidently in front of a large projection screen displaying various images and text related to data and experience, including visualizations like graphs, brain diagrams, and abstract patterns. The presenter holds a tablet in one hand and gestures with the other, indicating she is actively explaining the content. A man wearing a green beanie is seated in the foreground, attentively watching the presentation. The environment suggests a formal or educational context, possibly a conference or seminar, with a focus on data analysis or user experience design.
